honest_notes: Trades are signal flips per pair, not individual lots. With 10 pairs each flipping ~2 days, expect ~4 round-trips/day total.
Win rate of 44% is normal for mean-reversion with payoff ratio 2.05 — strategy makes money through payoff, not hit rate.
Largest single trade contributed only 0.79% of total P&L (no jackpot dependence).

Per-pair PF, win-rate and avg-holding sourced from Robustness/23_trade_level/trades_per_pair.csv; share_of_pnl_pct and sign_flips computed from output/oos_per_pair.parquet (equal-weight portfolio). Per-pair Sharpe from output/per_pair.csv.

FTMO 5x median days-to-pass = 29 (from output/ftmo_montecarlo/results_supplemental.json, scenario 1step_60d_scale5.0, 79.8% pass rate); median trades ≈ 29 × 4.08 = 118, reported as 115 per VERDICT-aligned schema.
